final_answer: The default admin IP for the AetherX AX-200 router is 192.168.1.1.

cited_chunks.quote:
Model: AX-200

- Default admin IP is 192.168.1.1.
- Factory reset requires holding the reset pin for 12 seconds.
- The status LED is solid blue when connected, blinking amber during firmware update.
- Supports Wi-Fi 6 on 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands.
